common.madeWith: Find your cosmic match. Real astrology, real connections.

hero.description: Find your cosmic match. AstroDating uses real astrology — birth charts, synastry, and planetary transits — to connect you with truly compatible people.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Real astrology. Real connections.
features.birthChartDesc: Full natal chart calculation using your exact birth time and location — sun, moon, rising, and all planetary placements.
features.synastryDesc: Real astrological compatibility scores based on synastry — how your planets interact with theirs.
features.discoveryDesc: Filter by zodiac sign, element, compatibility threshold, and more. Find people who align with your stars.
features.horoscopeDesc: Personalized daily, weekly, and monthly horoscopes based on your full birth chart — not just your sun sign.
features.transitsDesc: Get notified when planetary transits affect your love life. Venus retrograde? We'll let you know.
features.superLikesDesc: Stand out from the crowd. Send a super like to show someone you're especially interested.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to your cosmic match.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your birth date, time, and location. We calculate your complete natal chart automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse profiles ranked by real astrological compatibility. See detailed synastry breakdowns for every match.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Match with people who share your cosmic chemistry. Start conversations and see where the stars take you.

premium.title: Choose Your Plan
premium.subtitle: Unlock the full power of cosmic compatibility.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Cosmic Match?
cta.subtitle: Download AstroDating and discover connections written in the stars.

notFound.title: Lost in Space
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.effectiveDate: Effective date: February 4, 2026 — Last updated: March 10, 2026
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how AstroDating collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use the AstroDating mobile application (the "App"). It explains what information we gather, how we process it, who we share it with, and what rights you have regarding your data.
privacy.s0_text: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:
privacy.s0_address: 1234 Constellation Way, Suite 500, San Francisco, CA 94105, United States
privacy.s1_1_ex1: Name, email address, password, social-login tokens (Google, Apple, Facebook)
privacy.s1_1_ex2: Photos (up to 6), bio, age, gender, occupation, interests, relationship intentions
privacy.s1_1_ex3: Date of birth, time of birth, birth city, birth coordinates, sun / moon / rising signs, full natal chart
privacy.s1_1_ex4: Age range, maximum distance, gender preference, zodiac-sign filters, element filters, compatibility threshold
privacy.s1_1_ex5: Text messages exchanged with other users
privacy.s1_1_ex6: Any content you send when contacting our support team
privacy.s1_2_ex1: Device model, operating system, unique device identifiers, IP address, app version
privacy.s1_2_ex2: City, latitude, and longitude (used to show approximate distance to other users; exact coordinates are never shown to others)
privacy.s1_2_ex3: Swipe actions (like, super-like, pass), matches, feature usage, last-active timestamp, onboarding completion status
privacy.s1_2_ex4: Error stack traces, session data, and performance metrics collected via Sentry (disabled in development builds)
privacy.s1_2_ex5: Expo push token and device type, used solely to deliver notifications you have opted into
privacy.s1_3_social: Social-login providers — When you sign in with Google, Apple, or Facebook we receive your name and email address (and, if available, profile photo) as permitted by the provider.
privacy.s1_3_geo: Geocoding — We use OpenStreetMap / Nominatim to convert city names into coordinates. No personal identifiers are sent in these requests.
privacy.s2_provide: Provide the service — Create your account, display your profile, calculate your birth chart, compute compatibility scores, enable matching and messaging.
privacy.s2_personalize: Personalization — Show you profiles that match your discovery preferences and astrological compatibility.
privacy.s2_safety: Safety & integrity — Detect and prevent fraud, enforce our Terms of Service, and process user-block and report actions.
privacy.s2_comm: Communication — Send push notifications for new matches, messages, and important service updates.
privacy.s2_subs: Subscriptions — Process and manage premium subscriptions and in-app purchases through RevenueCat; track feature entitlements and trial usage.
privacy.s2_improve: Improvement & analytics — Understand usage patterns, diagnose crashes (via Sentry), and improve the App.
privacy.s2_legal: Legal compliance — Respond to lawful requests from authorities and enforce our legal rights.
privacy.s3_intro: Some information you provide may be considered sensitive under applicable law, including:
privacy.s3_item1: Date and time of birth, birth location (astrology data)
privacy.s3_note: This data is provided voluntarily and is used only to deliver the core features of the App (birth-chart calculation, compatibility matching, distance-based discovery). We do not sell sensitive data or use it for advertising.
privacy.s4_1_text: Your profile information (name, age, photos, bio, occupation, interests, zodiac signs, compatibility score) is visible to other users during discovery and after matching. Your exact location is never displayed; only an approximate distance is shown. Message content is visible only to you and the recipient.
privacy.s4_2_note: Each provider processes data only on our behalf and under contractual obligations to protect it.
privacy.s4_3_text: We may disclose your data if required by law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request, or to protect the rights, safety, or property of AstroDating, our users, or the public.
privacy.s4_4_text: If AstroDating is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your personal data may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will notify you of any such change.
privacy.s5_active: Active accounts — We retain your data for as long as your account is active and as needed to provide the service.
privacy.s5_deleted: Deleted accounts — When you delete your account, we delete or anonymize your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or necessary to resolve disputes.
privacy.s5_messages: Messages — Messages are deleted when both participants have deleted their accounts or the match is removed.
privacy.s5_crash: Crash reports — Sentry data is retained for up to 90 days.
privacy.s5_legal: Legal holds — Data may be retained longer if needed for ongoing legal proceedings or regulatory obligations.
privacy.s6_intro: We implement industry-standard measures to protect your data, including:
privacy.s6_tls: Encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS for all API communication)
privacy.s6_rest: Encryption at rest for stored data (Supabase-managed encryption)
privacy.s6_rls: Row-level security policies in the database to prevent unauthorized access
privacy.s6_hash: Password hashing (handled by Supabase Auth; we never store plaintext passwords)
privacy.s6_note: No system is completely secure. While we strive to protect your data, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s7_intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s7_access: Access — Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.s7_correction: Correction — Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy.s7_deletion: Deletion — Request deletion of your personal data.
privacy.s7_portability: Portability — Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s7_objection: Objection / Restriction — Object to or request restriction of certain processing activities.
privacy.s7_withdraw: Withdraw consent — Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
privacy.s7_ctrl1: Edit or delete your profile information at any time from the Profile tab.
privacy.s7_ctrl2: Adjust discovery preferences (age, distance, zodiac filters) from Settings.
privacy.s7_ctrl3: Block any user to prevent further interaction.
privacy.s7_ctrl4: Delete your account from the Settings screen, which triggers removal of your data.
privacy.s7_ctrl5: Manage push-notification permissions through your device settings.
privacy.s7_ccpa_intro: If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act, including:
privacy.s7_ccpa1: The right to know what personal information we collect and how it is used.
privacy.s7_ccpa2: The right to request deletion of your personal information.
privacy.s7_ccpa3: The right to opt out of the "sale" or "sharing" of personal information. We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.s7_ccpa4: The right to non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights.
privacy.s7_gdpr_intro: If you are in the European Economic Area or the United Kingdom, our legal bases for processing are set out below. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data-protection authority.
privacy.s7_gdpr_row2_data: Date, time, and place of birth
privacy.s7_profiling_intro: AstroDating uses automated processing to calculate compatibility scores between users. Here is how it works:
privacy.s7_profiling_what: What we do: We analyze your birth chart data (planetary positions, houses, aspects) alongside other users' charts using astrological synastry algorithms to generate a compatibility percentage.
privacy.s7_profiling_impact: Impact: The compatibility score influences the order in which profiles appear in your discovery feed. Profiles with higher compatibility scores are shown first. This does not affect your ability to view any profile or initiate contact — all users remain accessible.
privacy.s7_profiling_logic: Logic involved: The algorithm evaluates planetary aspects (conjunctions, trines, squares, oppositions, sextiles) between your chart and other users' charts, with particular weight given to personal planets (Sun, Moon, Venus, Mars) and relationship houses (5th, 7th, 8th).
privacy.s7_profiling_rights: Your rights: Under GDPR Article 22, you have the right to request human review of any decision significantly affecting you, to express your point of view, and to contest the decision. You can contact us to request manual review of your compatibility calculations.
privacy.s7_profiling_withdraw: You may withdraw consent for profiling at any time by deleting your account. Note that compatibility scoring is a core feature; disabling it would prevent the App from functioning as intended.
privacy.s8_text: Your data may be processed in countries other than your own. Where required, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses or other legally approved transfer mechanisms to ensure an adequate level of protection.
privacy.s9_text: AstroDating is intended for users aged 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 18. If we become aware that a user is under 18, we will promptly delete their account and associated data. If you believe a minor has created an account, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s10_text: The App may contain links to third-party websites or services. This Privacy Policy does not apply to those services, and we encourage you to review their privacy policies independently.
privacy.s11_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the App or by email before the changes take effect. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was most recently revised. Continued use of the App after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s12_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, contact us at:
privacy.s12_exercise_intro: To submit a data access, deletion, correction, or portability request:
privacy.s12_exercise1: Email us at privacy@astrodatingapp.com with your request.
privacy.s12_exercise2: We will verify your identity by matching the email address on your request with your registered account, or by requesting additional information if necessary.
privacy.s12_exercise3: For requests on behalf of another person, we require written authorization from the data subject and proof of their identity.
privacy.s12_timeline_gdpr: EEA/UK (GDPR): We will respond within 30 days. Complex requests may be extended by an additional 60 days, with prior notice.
privacy.s12_timeline_ccpa: California (CCPA/CPRA): We will respond within 45 days. Complex requests may be extended by an additional 45 days, with prior notice.
privacy.s12_timeline_other: Other jurisdictions: We aim to respond within 30 days.
privacy.s12_appeals: If you are unsatisfied with our response, you may contact your local data protection authority or file a complaint.
privacy.s12_response: We aim to respond to all general inquiries within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.effectiveDate: Effective Date: January 1, 2025 — Last Updated: January 1, 2025
terms.intro: Welcome to AstroDating. By accessing or using our application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the app.
terms.s1_text:
You must be at least 18 years old to use AstroDating. By creating an account, you confirm that:

• You are at least 18 years of age.
• You are legally able to enter into a binding agreement.
• You are not prohibited from using the service under any applicable law.
• You have not been previously banned from the platform.

We reserve the right to request proof of age at any time and to terminate accounts that do not meet this requirement.
terms.s2_text:
When you create an AstroDating account, you agree to:

• Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
• Maintain the security of your password and account.
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
• Not create more than one account per person.
• Not transfer your account to another person.

You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.s3_text:
You agree not to:

• Use the app for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
• Harass, abuse, threaten, or intimidate other users.
• Post content that is hateful, discriminatory, or violent.
• Impersonate any person or entity.
• Send spam, unsolicited messages, or promotional content.
• Use the app to solicit money from other users.
• Upload photos that do not belong to you or that contain nudity or explicit content.
• Use automated systems (bots, scripts) to access the service.
• Attempt to extract data or reverse engineer the app.

Violations may result in immediate account termination.
terms.s4_text:
• You retain ownership of the content you post on AstroDating, including photos, bio text, and messages.

• By posting content, you grant AstroDating a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content within the app for the purpose of providing the service.

• This license ends when you delete your content or account.

• AstroDating owns all intellectual property related to the app, including the matching algorithms, astrological calculations, design, and branding.

• You may not copy, modify, or distribute any part of the app without permission.
terms.s5_text:
• AstroDating offers free and premium subscription tiers.

• Premium subscriptions are billed through the App Store or Google Play.

• Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.

• You can manage or cancel your subscription through your device settings.

• Refunds are handled according to the policies of the App Store or Google Play.

• AstroDating reserves the right to change subscription prices with advance notice. Price changes will not affect your current billing period.
terms.s6_text:
• You may delete your account at any time from the Settings screen.

• AstroDating may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms, engage in harmful behavior, or for any other reason at our discretion.

• Upon termination, your right to use the app ceases immediately.

• We may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes.

• Termination does not entitle you to a refund for any unused portion of a paid subscription.
terms.s7_text:
• AstroDating is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind.

• We do not guarantee that the app will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.

• Astrological compatibility scores and horoscopes are for entertainment purposes only and should not be relied upon for making life decisions.

• We are not responsible for the behavior of other users. Always exercise caution when meeting someone in person.

• We do not perform background checks on users.

• We are not responsible for any content posted by users.
terms.s8_text:
To the maximum extent permitted by law:

• AstroDating shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.

• Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid to AstroDating in the 12 months preceding the claim.

• This includes damages for loss of profits, data, or other intangible losses.

• Some jurisdictions do not allow limitations on liability, so these limits may not apply to you.
terms.s9_text:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

• Email: legal@astrodatingapp.com
• Website: https://astrodatingapp.com/contact

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. We will notify you of material changes through the app.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about AstroDating.
help.stillNeedHelpDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.
help.q_createAccount: How do I create an account?
help.a_createAccount: Download AstroDating from Google Play or visit astrodatingapp.com. Sign up with your email, Google, or Facebook account (Apple Sign-In is available on iOS and web). You'll need to enter your birth date, time, and location to generate your natal chart.
help.q_changeBirthTime: Can I change my birth time after signing up?
help.a_changeBirthTime: Yes. Go to Profile > Edit Profile > Birth Details. Note that changing your birth time will recalculate your entire natal chart and may change your compatibility scores with other users.
help.q_deleteAccount: How do I delete my account?
help.a_deleteAccount: You can delete your account from Settings > Account > Delete Account in the app, or visit astrodatingapp.com/account/delete. Your data will be permanently removed within 30 days.
help.a_compatibility: We use real synastry — the astrological practice of comparing two birth charts. We analyze aspects between your planets and theirs (conjunctions, trines, squares, etc.) across key relationship houses to generate an overall compatibility score.
help.q_fewMatches: Why don't I see many matches?
help.a_fewMatches: Try expanding your discovery preferences: increase the distance range, widen the age range, or lower the minimum compatibility threshold. You can also remove specific zodiac sign or element filters.
help.a_superLike: A super like tells someone you're especially interested. They'll see a star icon on your profile. Free users get 1 super like per day, Celestial users get 5, and Cosmic users get unlimited. Super likes refresh daily at midnight.
help.q_manageSub: How do I manage my subscription?
help.a_manageSub: It depends on where you subscribed. On Android, manage through Google Play subscriptions settings. On the web, go to Settings > Billing in the web app to access your Stripe billing portal where you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel.
help.a_refund: For Google Play subscriptions, refunds are handled by Google according to their policies. For web (Stripe) subscriptions, contact our support team through the contact form. We review refund requests on a case-by-case basis.
help.a_autoRenew: Yes. Subscriptions auto-renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the current period ends. You can cancel at any time from Google Play settings (Android) or from the billing page on the web app.
help.q_promoCode: How do I use a promo code?
help.a_promoCode: On Android, go to the Plans screen and enter your promo code in the promo field before selecting a plan. On the web, enter the code on the checkout page. Promo codes apply discounts or bonus months depending on the campaign.
help.q_report: How do I report a user?
help.a_report: Tap the three-dot menu on any profile or in a chat conversation, then select 'Report'. Choose a reason and add details. Our team reviews all reports within 24 hours.
help.a_block: Tap the three-dot menu on their profile or in your chat, then select 'Block'. They won't be able to see your profile or contact you, and they won't be notified.
help.q_locationShared: Is my location shared with other users?
help.a_locationShared: Only your approximate distance is shown (e.g., '3 miles away'). Your exact coordinates are never visible to other users.
help.q_birthTime: Do I need to know my exact birth time?
help.a_birthTime: For the most accurate chart, yes. Your birth time determines your rising sign (ascendant) and house placements, which significantly affect compatibility scores. If you don't know your exact time, you can enter an approximate time — but your chart and scores will be less precise.
help.q_sunVsFull: What's the difference between sun sign and full chart compatibility?
help.a_sunVsFull: Sun sign compatibility only considers one planet. Full chart compatibility (synastry) analyzes all planetary placements, aspects, and house overlays between two charts — giving a much more nuanced and accurate picture of relationship dynamics.
help.a_personalizedHoroscopes: Yes. Unlike generic horoscopes based only on your sun sign, our horoscopes are calculated from your full natal chart, including transits to your moon, rising, Venus, and other key placements.
help.q_webApp: Can I use AstroDating on my computer?
help.a_webApp: Yes! Visit app.astrodatingapp.com to access the full web app. You can browse profiles, chat with matches, view your natal chart, and manage your subscription — all from your browser.
help.q_installPwa: Can I install the web app on my phone?
help.a_installPwa: Yes. Visit astrodatingapp.com in your mobile browser, then tap 'Add to Home Screen' (or the install prompt). The app will appear as an icon on your home screen and open in full-screen mode, just like a native app.
help.q_webSync: Is my data synced between the app and the web?
help.a_webSync: Yes. Your profile, matches, messages, and subscription are all synced in real time. You can switch between the mobile app and web app seamlessly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need help? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.mustBe18: You must be at least 18 years old.
contact.messageSentDesc: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you within 24 hours. Check your inbox for a confirmation email.

accountDelete.title: Account Deletion
accountDelete.subtitle: This will permanently delete your AstroDating account and all associated data including your profile, matches, and messages.
accountDelete.step1Desc: Enter the email address associated with your AstroDating account. We'll send you a verification code.
accountDelete.step2Desc: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to confirm account deletion.
accountDelete.warning: This action is permanent. Your account, profile, matches, messages, and all associated data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
accountDelete.doneDesc: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
accountDelete.doneNote: We're sorry to see you go. If you change your mind, you can always create a new account.

safety.title: Safety & Community Standards
safety.effectiveDate: Effective Date: February 10, 2026 — Last Updated: February 10, 2026
safety.intro: AstroDating is committed to creating a safe environment for all users. We have strict policies against child exploitation, harassment, and abuse. This page outlines our safety standards and reporting procedures.
safety.s1_intro: AstroDating is strictly for adults aged 18 and older. We have zero tolerance for any content or behavior that exploits, endangers, or sexualizes minors.
safety.s1_zeroTolerance: ZERO TOLERANCE: Any violation of our child safety policies results in immediate account termination and reporting to law enforcement.
safety.s1_csam: Child sexual abuse material (CSAM) is strictly prohibited and will be reported to NCMEC and law enforcement.
safety.s1_exploitation: Any content depicting, promoting, or facilitating child exploitation is forbidden.
safety.s1_minors: Users under 18 years of age are not permitted on the platform.
safety.s1_grooming: Any attempt to contact, solicit, or groom minors will result in permanent ban and law enforcement notification.
safety.s2_intro: We implement multiple measures to ensure all users are adults:
safety.s2_age18: All users must confirm they are at least 18 years old during registration.
safety.s2_verification: We may request additional age verification at any time.
safety.s2_termination: Accounts suspected of belonging to minors are immediately suspended pending verification.
safety.s3_intro: We employ comprehensive safety measures to protect our community:
safety.s3_reporting: In-app reporting system for inappropriate content and behavior
safety.s3_moderation: 24/7 content moderation and review of reported content
safety.s3_termination: Immediate account termination for policy violations
safety.s3_lawEnforcement: Full cooperation with law enforcement authorities
safety.s3_ncmec: Partnership with NCMEC (National Center for Missing & Exploited Children) for reporting illegal content
safety.s4_intro: If you encounter any concerning content or behavior, please report it immediately:
safety.s4_inApp: Use the in-app report feature (tap the three-dot menu on any profile or chat)
safety.s4_email: Email our safety team directly for urgent concerns
safety.s5_intro: All users must adhere to our community guidelines:
safety.s5_respect: Treat all users with respect and dignity
safety.s5_authentic: Use only your own photos and provide accurate information
safety.s5_noHarassment: No harassment, bullying, or threatening behavior
safety.s5_noHate: No hate speech, discrimination, or offensive content
safety.s5_noScams: No scams, spam, or solicitation of money
safety.s5_noExplicit: No explicit or pornographic content in public profiles
safety.s6_intro: AstroDating complies with all applicable laws regarding child protection and online safety:
safety.s6_laws: We comply with COPPA, CSAM reporting requirements, and international child protection laws.
safety.s6_ncmec: We report all discovered CSAM to NCMEC's CyberTipline as required by law.
safety.s6_cooperation: We cooperate fully with law enforcement investigations related to child safety.
safety.s7_text: For safety concerns or to report violations, contact our dedicated safety team:
safety.s7_response: We prioritize safety reports and aim to respond within 24 hours. Urgent matters involving child safety are addressed immediately.

webApp.profileWorkspaceUnavailable: Sign in to view and edit your profile on the web.
webApp.profileBioPlaceholder: Tell people a bit about yourself...
webApp.profileBioHint: Keep it concise and personal. Mention your vibe, interests, or what you are looking for.
webApp.profilePhotoError: Unable to update your profile photo right now.
webApp.profileBirthSectionBody: Add your birth date, birth time, and birth city so we can calculate your natal chart accurately.
webApp.profileBirthSectionHint: Your birth time improves rising sign accuracy. If you do not know it, you can leave it empty. You must be at least 18 years old to use AstroDating.
webApp.profilePreferencesBody: Choose who you want to see, your age range, distance, and elemental affinities.
webApp.profilePasswordBody: Update the password used for your web login.
webApp.profilePasswordMinLength: Your new password must contain at least 8 characters.
webApp.profilePasswordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
webApp.profileDeleteBody: This permanently removes your account and associated data after email verification.
webApp.chatHubSubtitle: Keep your ongoing conversations organized on the web.
webApp.chatInboxEmptyBody: As soon as you match with someone and start chatting, your conversations will appear here.
webApp.chatComposerHint: Press Enter to send. Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeWebSubtitle: Your first Cosmic feature is now available on the web app.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeSignIn: Sign in to access your Cosmic daily horoscope on the web.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeLockedBody: Daily Horoscope is reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to access your web-based forecast, energy check, and guidance blocks.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeOverviewBody: Today nudges {sign} toward clearer timing, softer intuition, and better emotional pacing. Use this forecast to focus your attention where momentum is easiest to build.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeSectionBody_love: {sign} benefits from emotional honesty today. Keep things direct, warm, and lightly playful if you want the best response.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeSectionBody_career: {sign} should prioritize one concrete win before scattering attention. The cleanest progress will come from clarity, not speed.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeSectionBody_wellbeing: {sign} regains balance by protecting quiet time and reducing noise around low-value decisions.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeSectionBody_lucky: {sign} is more aligned when acting on instinct quickly and then refining once momentum has started.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeAffirmationBody: I let {sign} move with intention, trust, and emotional precision today.
webApp.dailyHoroscopeFocusBody: Use the strongest energy block for one meaningful conversation, one practical decision, and one action that moves your relationships forward.
webApp.natalChartWebSubtitle: Your Celestial tier is now available on the web, starting with your full natal chart.
webApp.natalChartSignIn: Sign in to access your natal chart on the web.
webApp.natalChartLockedBody: The full natal chart is available from the Celestial tier upward. Upgrade to review your placements, elemental balance, and core chart summary on the web.
webApp.natalChartProfileUnavailable: Your profile data could not be loaded for the natal chart yet.
webApp.natalChartElementBody: Your chart leans toward {element}, which shapes how you react, move, and build momentum across relationships and decisions.
webApp.natalChartModalityBody: Your chart leans toward {modality}, which influences whether you initiate, stabilize, or adapt in changing situations.
webApp.natalInterpretation_sun: {sign} colors your identity, willpower, and the way you move toward long-term purpose.
webApp.natalInterpretation_moon: {sign} shapes your emotional reflexes, the comfort you seek, and how you recharge internally.
webApp.natalInterpretation_rising: {sign} influences your visible aura, your first impression, and the tone you bring into new environments.
webApp.natalChartSummaryBody: Your chart combines a {sun} Sun, a {moon} Moon, and a {rising} Rising. Together, they describe how you direct your energy, process emotion, and present yourself to the world.
webApp.celestialHubSubtitle: Your Celestial tier groups compatibility and core chart tools in one place.
webApp.celestialHubFeatureTitle: Celestial starts with your natal chart
webApp.celestialHubFeatureBody: This section will group every Celestial feature under one roof. Right now, your full natal chart is available here and future Celestial tools will live alongside it.
webApp.celestialHubItem_likes: See everyone who already liked your profile and like back instantly.
webApp.celestialHubItem_superLikes: Use your daily Super Likes to stand out instantly on the web.
webApp.celestialHubItem_priorityMessages: Push your best messages to the top and capture attention faster.
webApp.priorityMessagesWebSubtitle: Bring your messages forward and structure better openings on the web.
webApp.priorityMessagesHeroTitle: Be easier to notice in busy inboxes
webApp.priorityMessagesHeroBody: Priority Messages are built to help your best conversations get seen faster and start with more intent.
webApp.priorityMessagesSentBody: Your message volume across active conversations.
webApp.priorityMessagesActiveChatsBody: Current conversations you can keep moving forward.
webApp.priorityMessagesUnreadBody: Messages waiting for your attention right now.
webApp.priorityMessagesDemoTitle: A cleaner signal inside the conversation flow
webApp.priorityMessagesDemoRegularBody: Visible, but easy to blend into a busy inbox.
webApp.priorityMessagesDemoPriorityBody: Highlighted more clearly so your intent feels deliberate, not passive.
webApp.priorityMessagesBenefit1Body: Use them when the match matters and you want your opener to feel more intentional.
webApp.priorityMessagesBenefit2Body: A stronger signal helps your message stand out when someone already has multiple chats.
webApp.priorityMessagesBenefit3Body: The best results usually come when a strong opener meets a strong astrological fit.
webApp.priorityMessagesStarter1: I noticed one detail in your profile that feels very aligned with your chart. Is that something people notice about you offline too?
webApp.priorityMessagesStarter2: Our compatibility looks strong, but I am more curious about your real-world vibe. What usually catches your attention first in someone?
webApp.priorityMessagesStarter3: You seem like someone with a clear energy. What kind of connection are you actually hoping to build here?
webApp.superLikesWebSubtitle: Use your strongest signal of interest directly from the web app.
webApp.superLikesHeroBody: Super Likes push your interest to the front. Use them on profiles you genuinely want to prioritize.
webApp.superLikesRefreshBody: Your daily quota refreshes at midnight.
webApp.superLikesTotalSentBody: Your complete Super Like history on this account.
webApp.superLikesStep1Body: Reserve Super Likes for profiles you really want to move to the front of the line.
webApp.superLikesStep2Body: Your interest is highlighted more clearly than a standard like.
webApp.superLikesStep3Body: Used carefully, Super Likes create a stronger first signal before a match exists.
webApp.superLikesBenefit1Body: A Super Like communicates stronger intent than a regular like.
webApp.superLikesBenefit2Title: Use them where compatibility is high
webApp.superLikesBenefit2Body: They work best when the profile already looks aligned with your chart and goals.
webApp.superLikesBenefit3Body: Instead of spreading attention everywhere, put your strongest signal on your best prospects.
webApp.superLikesTip1: Prioritize profiles with strong compatibility or a bio that clearly resonates.
webApp.superLikesTip2: Avoid spending all of them too early if you usually discover better profiles later in the day.
webApp.superLikesTip3: Treat a Super Like as a scarce signal, not a default action.
webApp.likesWebSubtitle: Browse the people who already showed interest in your profile.
webApp.likesSubtitle: {count} profile(s) are waiting for your response.
webApp.likesEmptyBody: Keep discovering and your next cosmic admirer will show up here.
webApp.cosmicHubSubtitle: Your Cosmic tier groups forecasts, transits, and timing tools in one place.
webApp.cosmicHubFeatureTitle: Cosmic starts with the daily horoscope
webApp.cosmicHubFeatureBody: This section will hold every Cosmic feature. The daily horoscope is live now, and the rest of the Cosmic guidance stack will be added underneath this section.
webApp.synastryWebSubtitle: Compare your chart with your connections from the Celestial section.
webApp.synastrySignIn: Sign in to access your synastry analysis on the web.
webApp.synastryLockedBody: Advanced synastry is available from the Celestial tier upward. Upgrade to compare your chart with your connections on the web.
webApp.synastryEmptyTitle: No connections available for synastry yet
webApp.synastryEmptyBody: You need at least one connection before the web app can generate a compatibility comparison.
webApp.synastryOverviewBody: This synastry view blends your core placements with your connection's chart to highlight chemistry, communication, and long-term potential.
webApp.synastryAreaBody_emotional: Your Moon and water-based sensitivities show how easily you feel seen, soothed, and emotionally supported together.
webApp.synastryAreaBody_communication: Mercury patterns highlight how easily you explain feelings, resolve tension, and keep the connection moving.
webApp.synastryAreaBody_attraction: Venus and Mars dynamics reveal how strong the romantic pull feels and how naturally desire translates into chemistry.
webApp.synastryAreaBody_stability: Saturn-style themes show whether the relationship can hold steady structure once the initial spark settles.
webApp.synastryAspectBody_sunMoon: This aspect shapes the emotional rhythm between identity and comfort needs. It often sets the tone for how safe the bond feels.
webApp.synastryAspectBody_venusMars: This aspect measures romantic attraction, chemistry, and how desire becomes action between the two of you.
webApp.synastryAspectBody_mercury: This aspect reveals how you think together, process misunderstandings, and keep the relationship mentally alive.
webApp.synastryAspectBody_saturn: This aspect shows where commitment, structure, and long-term lessons become part of the relationship story.
webApp.planetaryTransitsWebSubtitle: Track the strongest cosmic movements inside the Cosmic section.
webApp.planetaryTransitsSignIn: Sign in to access your planetary transits on the web.
webApp.planetaryTransitsLockedBody: Planetary transits are reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to follow the strongest live movements, timing windows, and influence notes on the web.
webApp.planetaryTransitsOverviewBody: This live overview highlights the planetary movements most likely to shape your energy, timing, and emotional pacing over the current cycle.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_sun: The Sun transit sharpens identity, confidence, and how clearly you can move your priorities forward this month.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_moon: The Moon transit amplifies sensitivity, instinct, and the emotional weather that shapes your immediate responses.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_mercury: Mercury's transit influences communication, mental clarity, planning, and how smoothly conversations move.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_venus: Venus colors romance, pleasure, finances, and the kind of social softness available right now.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_mars: Mars pushes action, courage, irritation thresholds, and the way effort turns into visible movement.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_jupiter: Jupiter expands optimism, luck, learning, and the belief that a bigger version of your life is available.
webApp.planetaryTransitBody_saturn: Saturn reinforces structure, responsibility, patience, and the work required to hold long-term progress.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_sun: A shift in solar tone will redirect where confidence and personal attention want to go next.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_moon: The lunar shift changes emotional rhythm quickly, making this transit useful for timing inner work and connection.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_mercury: This shift changes how ideas move, how direct communication feels, and where focus becomes sharper.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_venus: This incoming Venus movement can soften social dynamics or intensify attraction depending on timing.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_mars: A Mars shift changes your motivation style, pressure level, and the kind of action that feels most effective.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_jupiter: A Jupiter change opens a new growth story, often expanding confidence, luck, and long-range vision.
webApp.planetaryTransitUpcomingBody_saturn: A Saturn transition redefines discipline, maturity, and the structures that can actually last.
webApp.planetaryTransitsTip_1: Use harmonious windows for outreach, visibility, and conversations that benefit from warmth or confidence.
webApp.planetaryTransitsTip_2: Use neutral windows for planning, editing, and practical decisions that need clarity more than speed.
webApp.planetaryTransitsTip_3: Use challenging windows to slow down reactions and stay intentional when energy spikes or emotions compress.
webApp.luckyDaysWebSubtitle: Track the strongest dates for timing, action, and emotional flow inside Cosmic.
webApp.luckyDaysSignIn: Sign in to access your lucky days on the web.
webApp.luckyDaysLockedBody: Lucky days are reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to review your best timing windows and month-level guidance on the web.
webApp.luckyDaysOverviewBody: {sign} has a clearer timing advantage this month. Use these highlighted dates in {month} to choose when to move, ask, launch, or slow down.
webApp.luckyDaysCategoryBody_love: Use these dates for honest conversations, attraction, softer intimacy, and clearer emotional reciprocity.
webApp.luckyDaysCategoryBody_career: Use these dates to pitch, negotiate, organize, and move one concrete priority forward cleanly.
webApp.luckyDaysCategoryBody_money: Use these dates for budgeting, practical decisions, measured spending, and resource conversations.
webApp.luckyDaysCategoryBody_health: Use these dates to reset routines, protect energy, and make choices that reduce internal noise.
webApp.luckyDaysCategoryBody_creativity: Use these dates to brainstorm, publish, design, and act on ideas before hesitation flattens momentum.
webApp.luckyDaysTip_1: Use the highest-energy dates for actions that benefit from visibility, courage, or emotional clarity.
webApp.luckyDaysTip_2: Use the lighter dates for revision, reflection, and quieter conversations instead of forcing outcomes.
webApp.luckyDaysTip_3: Pick one category at a time so your timing stays focused instead of spreading attention across everything.
webApp.datePlannerWebSubtitle: Find the strongest upcoming dates and time windows for real-world connection.
webApp.datePlannerSignIn: Sign in to access your Cosmic date planner on the web.
webApp.datePlannerLockedBody: Date Planner is reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to see the best upcoming dates, timing windows, and score breakdowns on the web.
webApp.datePlannerEmptyTitle: No connections available for planning yet
webApp.datePlannerEmptyBody: You need at least one connection before the web app can suggest your best upcoming dates.
webApp.datePlannerOverviewBody: Use this planner to choose the strongest upcoming windows for a conversation, a first meetup, or a more intentional date.
webApp.datePlannerTopDatesBody: Your highest-potential windows over the next days.
webApp.datePlannerDescription_excellent: This date carries the strongest blend of chemistry, timing, and emotional ease. Use it for a higher-stakes invitation or an experience you want to feel memorable.
webApp.datePlannerDescription_good: This date is supportive for steady connection, lighter flirting, and plans that feel natural without needing to force intensity.
webApp.datePlannerDescription_challenging: This date still works, but it is better for something low-pressure. Keep expectations realistic and let the interaction stay simple.
webApp.retrogradeWebSubtitle: Track active retrogrades, upcoming shifts, and the alerts you want to keep on.
webApp.retrogradeSignIn: Sign in to access retrograde alerts on the web.
webApp.retrogradeLockedBody: Retrograde alerts are reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to follow active cycles, practical effects, and reminder settings on the web.
webApp.retrogradeOverviewBody: Use this space to stay ahead of retrograde cycles, anticipate pressure points, and adjust your timing before momentum gets messy.
webApp.retrogradeAlertHint: This first web version keeps your alert toggles ready, even if notification delivery is not wired yet.
webApp.retrogradeTip_1: Slow down communication when Mercury is involved and confirm details before assuming alignment.
webApp.retrogradeTip_2: Use Venus retrograde periods to reassess value and desire instead of forcing aesthetic or relational certainty.
webApp.retrogradeTip_3: Use Saturn retrograde periods to tighten structure, revisit commitments, and clean weak systems before scaling again.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mercury_1: Mercury retrograde increases friction in messaging, scheduling, and the mental clarity needed for clean decisions.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mercury_2: You may notice more crossed wires, edits, delays, or conversations that need a second pass.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mercury_3: This cycle is useful for reviewing, revising, and reworking ideas instead of rushing fresh commitments.
webApp.retrogradeDo_mercury_1: Double-check logistics, dates, and written details.
webApp.retrogradeDo_mercury_2: Leave extra room for edits, clarifications, and follow-up conversations.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_mercury_2: Avoid locking major decisions without reviewing the details twice.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_venus_1: Venus retrograde brings relationship values, attraction patterns, and aesthetic choices up for review.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_venus_2: Old feelings or unfinished dynamics can return so they can be seen more clearly.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_venus_3: It is better for reflection than for forcing certainty around love, beauty, or spending.
webApp.retrogradeDo_venus_1: Review what you actually want from connection and reciprocity.
webApp.retrogradeDo_venus_2: Let attraction unfold slowly enough to see what is sustainable.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_venus_1: Avoid over-romanticizing people you do not know well yet.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_venus_2: Avoid impulsive appearance or luxury decisions driven by mood.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mars_1: Mars retrograde changes motivation, pressure, and the way conflict wants to surface.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mars_2: Energy can feel inconsistent, with bursts of push followed by frustration or fatigue.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_mars_3: This cycle favors strategy, redirection, and measured action over brute force.
webApp.retrogradeDo_mars_1: Channel energy into steady progress and revision of tactics.
webApp.retrogradeDo_mars_2: Notice where frustration is information, not just irritation.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_mars_1: Avoid escalating conflict from impatience alone.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_mars_2: Avoid assuming speed is the same thing as progress.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_saturn_1: Saturn retrograde turns attention back toward accountability, structure, and unfinished lessons.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_saturn_2: It can highlight systems that look stable but no longer hold real weight.
webApp.retrogradeEffect_saturn_3: This is useful for rebuilding foundations with more honesty and endurance.
webApp.retrogradeDo_saturn_1: Audit commitments, boundaries, and timelines realistically.
webApp.retrogradeDo_saturn_2: Use the period to strengthen routines that support long-term consistency.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_saturn_1: Avoid pretending a weak structure will fix itself with time.
webApp.retrogradeAvoid_saturn_2: Avoid overloading yourself with obligations that do not truly fit.
webApp.monthlyHoroscopeWebSubtitle: See the bigger monthly arc, key shifts, and strongest windows for your sign.
webApp.monthlyHoroscopeSignIn: Sign in to access your monthly horoscope on the web.
webApp.monthlyHoroscopeLockedBody: Monthly Horoscope is reserved for the Cosmic tier. Upgrade to read the broader monthly forecast, key dates, and weekly themes on the web.
webApp.monthlyHoroscopeOverviewBody: This month nudges {sign} toward a bigger reset in timing, relationships, and practical direction. Use the broader view before making high-friction decisions.
webApp.monthlySectionBody_love: {sign} moves best this month with emotional honesty, softer pacing, and fewer mixed signals.
webApp.monthlySectionBody_career: {sign} benefits from choosing one strategic priority and protecting focus around it until momentum becomes visible.
webApp.monthlySectionBody_wellbeing: {sign} needs cleaner rhythms, less emotional clutter, and more deliberate recovery between intense moments.
webApp.monthlySectionBody_luck: {sign} has stronger results when acting during clear windows instead of pushing through resistance blindly.
webApp.monthlyWeekBody_1: The opening stretch is better for recalibration, cleanup, and reducing background noise before bigger movement starts.
webApp.monthlyWeekBody_2: This week favors action, outreach, and conversations that benefit from clearer confidence.
webApp.monthlyWeekBody_3: This stretch is more emotionally sensitive, so pacing and recovery matter more than forcing output.
webApp.monthlyWeekBody_4: The closing stretch helps you keep what works and release what no longer supports the month ahead.
webApp.monthlyImportantBody_1: A softer relational tone supports warmth, attraction, and conversations that need better reciprocity.
webApp.monthlyImportantBody_2: This date is better for clarity, completion, and emotional truth than for starting something vague.
webApp.monthlyImportantBody_3: Expect more friction around logistics and words. Keep details explicit and leave space for revision.
webApp.monthlyImportantBody_4: A cleaner reset window appears here for intentions, timing shifts, and a more deliberate next step.
webApp.monthlyBestDays_love: Love: strongest chemistry windows cluster around the second and fourth week.
webApp.monthlyBestDays_career: Career: the cleanest momentum shows up after the first reset phase is complete.
webApp.monthlyBestDays_manifestation: Manifestation: use the late-month opening for intention, timing, and visibility.
webApp.celestialHubWorkspaceBody: Unlock your strongest astrology layer with chart tools, compatibility reading, and Celestial perks gathered in one place.
webApp.celestialHubSidebar_chart_natal: Your core placements, element balance, and the chart summary that anchors the tier.
webApp.celestialHubSidebar_chart_synastry: Match-by-match compatibility reading built on the same chart language as your natal view.
webApp.celestialHubSidebar_nextBody: Visibility and likes-related tools can slot into this workspace once they are ready for the web layer.
webApp.cosmicHubWorkspaceBody: Your horoscopes, timing tools, and cosmic guidance in one place.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_active_daily: Daily signal checks, energy framing, and quick directional guidance.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_active_monthly: A wider monthly arc so decisions are not made from a single-day snapshot.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_active_transits: Live movement tracking for the planets shaping timing, pressure, and opportunity.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_timing_lucky: Best dates by category when you need cleaner timing and less friction.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_timing_planner: Match-specific windows for planning real conversations, invites, and dates.
webApp.cosmicHubSidebar_timing_retrograde: Alerts, pressure points, and practical reminders when cosmic cycles get noisy.
webApp.reportReasonPrompt: Tell us why you want to report this profile.
webApp.reportError: Unable to submit your report right now.
webApp.reportRateLimit: Too many reports. Please try again later.
webApp.profileSupportBody: If something is wrong with your account, billing, or another user, contact support by email and include as much detail as possible.
webApp.tapToReveal: Tap each card to reveal your reading
webApp.tarotLockedBody: Tarot readings are available with Celestial (monthly) or Cosmic (weekly) plans.
webApp.upgradeForWeekly: Upgrade to Cosmic for weekly readings and the bonus Cosmic Advice card.
webApp.referralRewardInfo: Both you and your friend get 1 month of premium free!
webApp.noReferralsYet: Share your code to start inviting friends
webApp.referralSuccess: Referral applied! You both get 1 month free.
